Bash('/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe' -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -U metalshopping_app -d metalshopping -c 'SELECT schemaname, tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = '\\''mpc'\\'' ORDER BY tablename;')
